headline: Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH) Slides After Mixed Q1 Results Disappoint Investors
summary: Enphase Energy beat Q1 EPS estimates but saw a slight revenue miss, causing shares to drop 4.5% after-hours as investors weigh a weak outlook amid a 20.6% year-over-year revenue decline.
